content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/src/app/pages/status/status.component.ts", "summary": "This component manages the status page for a job in the StoryForge application. It polls the server to get the current state of the job and updates the UI accordingly, handling different states such as analyzing, clarifying, generating stories, reviewing, creating tasks, and completion or error conditions.", "rules": [{"name": "Poll Job Status", "description": "Periodically fetches the status of a job from the server and updates the component's state based on the response.", "conditions": ["Job ID is available"], "actions": ["Subscribe to getAssessmentStatus() observable", "Update UI with new state", "Redirect if necessary"]}, {"name": "Handle Job Completion or Error", "description": "Stops polling and redirects user when job reaches done or error status.", "conditions": ["Job status is 'done' or 'error'"], "actions": ["Stop polling interval", "Navigate to appropriate route"]}, {"name": "Format Stories for Display", "description": "Formats generated stories, tasks, and test scenarios into a readable string format for display in the UI.", "conditions": ["Generated stories are available"], "actions": ["Generate formatted text for each story including user story, acceptance criteria, dev tasks, unit tests"]}, {"name": "Copy Stories to Clipboard", "description": "Copies generated stories to clipboard and updates button label accordingly.", "conditions": ["User clicks copy button"], "actions": ["Write stories text to clipboard", "Update UI with success message for 2 seconds"]}], "dependencies": ["@angular/common", "@angular/router", "../../services/storyforge.service"]}
